description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box designed to hold multiple cans of beer, featuring vibrant and detailed illustrations on all visible sides. The front and back panels display colorful scenes: one side shows a beach with a meditating figure and a large beer glass, while the other depicts a campsite with a campfire, tent, and motorcycle. The top of the box is light blue with additional branding and product information, and the sides show images of the beer cans inside. The box is primarily made of printed cardboard and is likely lightweight, with a glossy finish that enhances the vividness of the artwork. The box is sealed and functions as a multipack carrier for beer cans, suitable for transport and storage.
description: A vividly illustrated rectangular cardboard beer multipack box with beach and campsite scenes, holding several cans inside. The box features colorful graphics and product branding on all sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows a beach scene with a meditating figure, a large beer glass, and prominent product branding.
description_view_1: The left side displays images of the beer cans inside the box, along with part of the top branding.
description_view_2: The back view features a campsite scene with a campfire, tent, and motorcycle, along with product branding.
description_view_3: The right side shows more beer can images and a continuation of the top branding.
attribute_graphic_design: The exterior features colorful, cartoon-style illustrations depicting beach and campsite scenes, with bold, playful typography and a mix of light blue, purple, and other vibrant colors. The design is lively and eye-catching, with detailed imagery and a glossy finish.
